data.title: Scam Sniffer warns that fake "relay bridge" phishing websites appear in Google ads
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Scam Sniffer posted on the X platform that three fake "Relay Bridge" phishing websites appeared in the Google search interface ads. Please do not interact with any ads, bookmark compliant websites, and report phishing websites.

data.title: Google Ads Display Fake Relay Bridge Phishing Sites
data.description: According to Odaily, Scam Sniffer has issued a warning on the X platform about the presence of three fraudulent 'Relay Bridge' phishing websites appearing in Google search advertisements. Users are advised to avoid interacting with any advertisements and to bookmark legitimate websites while reporting any phishing sites encountered.

data.title: Hong Kong Boosts Capital Markets with Revolutionary Tokenization Technology
data.description:
Key Points: According to Ming Pao, Hong Kong Financial Secretary Michael Wong Wai-lun announced that the Hong Kong government will enhance the supervision and regulatory framework for virtual assets. Hong Kong Expands Tokenization Technology in Capital Markets Michael Wong Wai-lun emphasized the government’s commitment to promoting the broader application of tokenization technology in the...
source: https://coincu.com/323489-hong-kong-tokenization-technology

data.title: Santiment: LTC daily trading volume reaches $9.6 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Santiment data shows that driven by ETF speculation, Litecoin's daily trading volume reached 9.6 billion US dollars. Previously, Bloomberg ETF analysts said that there is a 90% chance that the spot Litecoin ETF will be approved before the end of the year. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain: Plans to conduct a testnet Pascal hard fork on February 25 and advance to the mainnet in mid-March
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of BNB Chain, BNB Smart Chain (BSC) will conduct a Pascal hard fork. The fork is scheduled to be carried out on the test network on February 25, 2025, and the main network is scheduled to be carried out in mid-March 2025. The Pascal hard fork enhances the compatibility of BSC with Ethereum by integrating the key functions of the Ethereum Pectra upgrade.

data.title: Binance officially launched a community questioning campaign and will select 5 questions for answer
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance officially released the "AskBinance" theme tweet on the X platform to solicit community questions, covering products, technology, marketing, etc. Community users can send questions in the comments before 4:00 on February 24 (UTC+8), and the official will select 5 questions to answer.

data.title: Gate.io APP Innovation Zone launches "Logo Mode" to improve Meme screening capabilities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Gate.io APP Innovation Zone has been upgraded and launched a new "Logo Mode", which aims to help users identify popular Meme Logos in a more interesting way and instantly grasp the culture and narrative behind Meme.
It is reported that the Gate.io Innovation Zone is committed to integrating the advantages of spot trading and on-chain trading to lower the technical threshold for users to participate in on-chain projects. Users do not need to operate Web3 wallets or manage private keys. They can directly participate in hot projects on the chain with a Gate.io account and capture early investment opportunities faster.

data.title: GMGN and BNB Chain jointly launched a trading competition with a prize pool of 100 BNB, which ended on the 26th
A trader bought 6783 $SHADOW 17 days ago and currently has a floating profit of $1.15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 17 days ago a trader spent 150,300 S tokens (US$70,500) to buy 6,783 $SHADOW. The current value of these tokens is approximately US$1.22 million, with a floating profit of US$1.15 million.

data.title: Binance Alpha adds B3, FLUID, VVV, TOKEN, DRIFT, CPOOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has added B3, FLUID, VVV, TOKEN, DRIFT, and CPOOL.
